channel.title: World
channel.description: The Washington Post World section provides information and analysis of breaking world news stories. In addition to our world news and video, Post World News offers discussions and blogs on major international news and economic issues.

item.title: To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry
item.dc:creator: John Hudson
item.description: The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan.

item.title: Iran threatens retaliation after U.S. strikes in southern Iran
item.dc:creator: Dan Lamothe, John Hudson
item.description: The attacks prompted Tehran to warn that it would “leave no act of hostility unanswered,” complicating negotiations to end the war.

item.title: U.S. allies in Asia are trying to shield themselves from Trump’s unpredictability
item.dc:creator: Michelle Lee, Lyric Li, Chie Tanaka
item.description: President Donald Trump’s seeming ambivalence about the value of allies has created a sense of urgency among nations with close U.S. ties.

item.title: As new Iran deal faces sharp criticism, Trump seeks to widen Abraham Accords
item.dc:creator: Sammy Westfall, John Hudson
item.description: GOP lawmakers warned against concessions to Iran in any deal to end the war, while doubts greeted Trump’s push to expand pacts between Israel and Muslim-majority nations.
